title: gonystylus pendulus
intro: Gonystylus pendulus, also known as the pendulous gonystylus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gonystylus pendulus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, among others. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or ointment, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine for its therapeutic properties.
